nasb.text: And He *came the third time, and *said to them, “Are you still sleeping and resting? It is enough; the hour has come; behold, the Son of Man is being betrayed into the hands of sinners.

esv.text: And he came the third time and said to them, “Are you still sleeping and taking your rest? It is enough; the hour has come. The Son of Man is betrayed into the hands of sinners.

cnv.text: 耶穌第三次回來，對他們說：“你們還在睡覺休息嗎？夠了，時候到了，看哪，人子要被交在罪人手裡了。

ccb.text: 祂第三次祷告回来后，对他们说：“你们还在睡觉休息吗？够了，时候到了，看啊，人子要被出卖、交在罪人的手里了。

csbs.text: 耶稣第三次回来，对他们说：“你们还在睡觉、休息吗？已经够了，时候到了！看哪，人子被交在罪人的手里了。
